version.description: Schema version. Bumped on breaking changes.

updated.description: ISO date the registry was last regenerated.

schemaUrl.description: URL of this JSON Schema document.

submitProcessUrl.description: URL of the human-readable submission process documentation.

id.description: Unique identifier. Lowercase, hyphen-separated, 3–64 chars. Used as install handle: `/plugins install <id>`.

description.description: One-paragraph description shown in search results. Should explain the value, not just the surface area.

author.description: Author or organization name. Use `colony-team` for first-party plugins.

verified.description: True if reviewed by the Colony team for security and quality. Community plugins are still safe to install via the standard approval flow, but verified plugins get an additional review pass.

source.description: Install source. Prefixed by scheme: `npm:<package>` or `github:<owner>/<repo>`.

homepageUrl.description: Optional link to plugin docs or repo.
